n: Book 7, Chapter 6: The Window on the West

steps.t: Golasdín welcomed you to explore the hidden path, the cave hideout, and the look-out at Henneth Annûn. He warned you not to enter the Forbidden Pool.
Aragorn is outside Henneth Annûn, and wishes to speak to you.
The Rangers of Ithilien have a useful scouting location to the north-east of Henneth Annûn. Aragorn asked you to find Orndil and to scout ahead of the…
Orndil is north-east of Henneth Annûn, and wishes to speak with you.
Orndil thought he saw something to the north-east. You should investigate further.
Aragorn is outside Henneth Annûn, and wishes to speak to you. You have learned that Orcs and Easterlings aim to ambush the Host of the West as it trav…
